title: Flaky Fresh Mexican Jerusalem Artichokes Tacos
description: Crispy Jerusalem artichokes sauteed with Mexican spices, served in warm corn tortillas for a light, energizing vegetarian taco.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced red onion and sauté for about 3 minutes until translucent.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the sliced Jerusalem artichokes, season with salt and pepper, and cook for 8–10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they begin to brown and become flaky.
Sprinkle the cumin, smoked paprika, and chili powder over the artichokes, and stir to coat evenly; cook for another 1 minute.
Stir in the lime juice and chopped cilantro, adjusting seasoning as needed.
Warm the corn tortillas in a separate dry skillet or microwave until pliable.
Divide the artichoke mixture evenly among the tortillas, and serve immediately with extra lime wedges if desired.
